text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Um... Maruzen! Are you free tomorrow?! If you
are... w-would you like to hang out with me to
play another game?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Sure, I have time... but you look rather pale,
Chiyo. Aren't you tired?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we leave the games for another time?
You should probably get some—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
No need! I'm overflowing with energy! So... please
look forward to tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ah... Chiyo! I hope she's okay...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I arrive at the designated meeting spot to find a
crowd already waiting.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
What's all this about, Chiyo? There's a... lot of
paper strewn around.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
We planned a fun activity to thank you for
everything! It was Chiyo's idea!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
You have to shoot at the paper tassels with these
water guns! And once you do, there will be a
raffle number waiting for you underneath the
target.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
These numbers are hidden all over! Try to find as
many as you can, okay?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Huh, an activity to thank me? Raffle? H-hold on a
second, what is going—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Why not give it a go first? Learning is all about
doing!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Uh, what?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky uncharacteristically panics at first.
But as she gradually grasps the situation, she gets
back to her normal self.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
I got a three! Let's see... I have to sing my favorite
song a cappella?! Th-that's so embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Then, I'll clap a beat for you. ♪ Come on,
show me how hip and groovy you can get!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Number nine! Oh, I won a juice box! On to the
next target.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, you've got some competition, missy! Time
to aim and... shoot!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yay, I got number one! So, what do I win? Hehe,
this is so exciting.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: You win... a tickle punishment!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: What?! But I got a one?! Eek!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sound of laughter fills the air. With the game
having no clear winner, everyone is free to enjoy
themselves.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'll definitely get a good one next time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Sakura Chiyono O's idea has gone
exactly to plan.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Phew... That was a blast! Thanks a lot, Chiyo! But
what's all this about thanking me?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Well, you're always looking out for us. So that's
why...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I wanted you to enjoy yourself for a change! I
know it sounds a little childish, but I...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Chiyo... So that's what you've been thinking
this whole time. Is that why you've been so busy
lately?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, well a lot of that was me fumbling around! But
all the running I got to do was just as fun.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I kept thinking about what would make you
happy and how your smile would look. I couldn't
stop myself.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And then... your reaction was so much better than
I had imagined! Thank you so much, Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I hope I get to see you smile like you did today
more and more!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm so grateful, Chiyo! And you're right. I should
probably let others be caring towards me more
often!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
A-any time you want! Just say the word... I'm more
than happy to oblige!
choice_data_list: Looks like you hit the ball out of the park.
Looks like you hit the ball out of the park.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! The raffle target game was a big success...
Oh! Look, there's still one left. Do you want to
shoot it down, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Sakura Chiyono O's gaze to the remaining
target in question. After I shoot it down...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... You got number nineteen! That's a
good one! Your prize is a piggyback ride home!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hold on a second. I wanted to thank you too,
Trainer! So instead of a piggyback...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You can hop in my ride! I'm ready to hit the gas!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The journey back is a wild one, a reflection of
how much Maruzensky enjoyed today.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Let's see, you got a number... Pfft! Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Roger that! Hehe... Get ready, Trainer. ♪
...Because you're in for a chase!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O & Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Take this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O and Maruzensky fire their
water guns, drenching me from head to toe...
